nodes.context: One of two criminal organizations controlling Galveston underworld until mid-1920s, led by Ollie Quinn and Dutch Voight.
Criminal organization led by Sam and Rosario Maceo that took over Galveston underworld after Quinn.

edges.context: Sam and Rosario Maceo, who later led Sam Maceo's Organization, were mentored by Quinn and took over the Galveston underworld.
